segments.speaker: Associate
segments.text: Hi, welcome in. Let me know if you have any questions.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. I'm just browsing, but this lamp caught my eye.

segments.speaker: Associate
segments.text: It's made by a local designer.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Really? The material feels warmer than it looks from a distance.

segments.speaker: Associate
segments.text: It's a recycled composite with a matte finish.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Interesting. I'm studying architecture, so I tend to get curious about materials.

segments.speaker: Associate
segments.text: Then you'd probably like the furniture section in the back.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'll check it out. Is this piece available in other colors?

segments.speaker: Associate
segments.text: Yes, we can order it in black or off-white.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I'm not buying today, but I may come back once I settle into my place.
